arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes claim over contracts 'full picture' as Liverpool face anxious wait on three deals

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Chelsea combined XI: Reds dominate the defence as Cole Palmer and Mo Salah feature in a star-studded forward line - but which £100m man misses out?
arts.sum: Since only players who are available for selection are included, Alisson Becker misses the cut, due to injury with Marc Cucurella unavailable through suspension.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer raises alarm bells over ‘crazy’ Liverpool situation and admits ‘we’re all amazed'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's future is up in the air as he has failed to agree a new deal at Liverpool, and Alan Shearer is amazed that the Reds have allowed the situation to get this far

arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca singles out one of his wingers for praise ahead of the Blues' Sunday showdown at Liverpool in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Villarreal ‘thinking about’ making summer approach for Chelsea central midfielder
arts.sum: Cesare Casadei is attracting interest from two different countries, including Spain’s Villarreal. The La Liga side have hopes of signing the 21-year-old Chelsea midfielder. Since joining the Blues in 2022, the young Italian has struggled to break into the first team. arts.ttl: Alan Hansen given hero's welcome as Liverpool great returns to old club after health scare

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd hatch Davies plan; Liverpool plot Kounde bid
arts.sum: Manchester United are prepared to meet Alphonso Davies ' wage demands with a blank cheque as they hope to convince the Bayern Munich left-back to reject interest from Real Madrid in favour of a move to Old Trafford. Kyle Walker will be made available for transfer next summer, with Manchester City prepared to demand a fee of £15m in the face of interest from Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Bid prepared: Club ready to pay €150m to beat Liverpool & Man United to superstar transfer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly lining up a huge bid for the transfer of Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz, who is also said to be on the radar of top clubs such as Liverpool and Manchester United.
